name: Random Hero Defense
short_description: Block enemies with randomly generated heroes Survive until the last round and clear the game. Defeat enemies and use the gold you earn to produce more heroes and become stronger.
detailed_description:
This game is Random Hero Defense.
You summon units with goods.
The units you summon are classified according to certain probabilities.
Of course, the higher the grade, the harder it is to obtain, right?
Collect these units to defeat enemies that become increasingly stronger each round.
If the enemies destroy your building first, you lose.
Summon the best units to block waves of enemies and defend the building for up to 30 rounds!
